name: codegraph_reindex_workspace
description: Reindex the workspace to refresh the code graph. Default is INCREMENTAL — only re-parses files that changed since last index (much faster). Set force=true for full rebuild when parsers were updated or graph is corrupted.

force.description: Force full reindex — clears the graph and re-parses all files. Default false (incremental — only re-parses files that changed since last index).
